name: mmop-desktop
description: MMOP — open source desktop mod manager (Electron client)
author: cronozx

scripts.build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production webpack && tsc && node scripts/generate-client-env.mjs
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run watch" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development NODE_OPTIONS=--import=tsx electron-forge start"
scripts.package: npm run clean:artifacts && npm run build && cross-env FORGE_MAIN_ENTRY=dist/index.js electron-forge package
scripts.make: npm run clean:artifacts && npm run build && cross-env FORGE_MAIN_ENTRY=dist/index.js electron-forge make
scripts.make:extract: npm run make && unzip -q -o out/make/zip/darwin/arm64/mop-darwin-arm64-*.zip -d out/make/zip/darwin/arm64 && npm run verify:make-main-entry
scripts.verify:make-main-entry: node --input-type=module -e "import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(process.cwd() + '/package.json'); const asar = require('@electron/asar'); const asarPath = 'out/make/zip/darwin/arm64/mop.app/Contents/Resources/app.asar'; const entry = asar.extractFile(asarPath, 'dist/index.js').toString(); const minecraft = asar.extractFile(asarPath, 'dist/src/main/ipc/minecraft.js').toString(); const checks = [['entry database .js', entry.includes(\"from './src/main/database/database.js'\")], ['entry ipc auth .js', entry.includes(\"from './src/main/ipc/auth.js'\")], ['entry ipc minecraft .js', entry.includes(\"from './src/main/ipc/minecraft.js'\")], ['entry extensionless database', !entry.includes(\"from './src/main/database/database'\")], ['entry extensionless ipc auth', !entry.includes(\"from './src/main/ipc/auth'\")], ['entry extensionless ipc minecraft', !entry.includes(\"from './src/main/ipc/minecraft'\")], ['minecraft store .js', minecraft.includes(\"from '../utils/store.js'\")], ['minecraft database .js', minecraft.includes(\"from '../database/database.js'\")], ['minecraft extensionless store', !minecraft.includes(\"from '../utils/store'\")], ['minecraft extensionless database', !minecraft.includes(\"from '../database/database'\")]]; const failed = checks.filter(([, ok]) => !ok); if (failed.length) { console.error('Packaged main entry verification failed:', failed.map(([name]) => name).join(', ')); process.exit(1); } console.log('Packaged main entry verification passed.');"
